AUTH_REQUIRED.title: You need to sign in
AUTH_REQUIRED.message: Your session don finish. Abeg sign in to continue.

AUTH_EXPIRED.title: Session don expire
AUTH_EXPIRED.message: Your session don expire for security. Abeg sign in again.

AUTH_MFA_REQUIRED.title: Verification needed
AUTH_MFA_REQUIRED.message: Abeg complete multi-factor authentication to continue.

AUTH_FORBIDDEN.title: Access denied
AUTH_FORBIDDEN.message: You no get permission to do dis action.

ACCOUNT_NOT_FOUND.title: Account no dey
ACCOUNT_NOT_FOUND.message: We no fit find the account wey you dey find.

ACCOUNT_FROZEN.title: Account don freeze
ACCOUNT_FROZEN.message: Dem don freeze dis account and e no fit process transactions now.

ACCOUNT_CLOSED.title: Account don close
ACCOUNT_CLOSED.message: Dem don close dis account and e no dey active again.

INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS.title: Money no reach
INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS.message: Money no reach for dis account to complete the transaction.

TRANSFER_LIMIT_EXCEEDED.title: Transfer limit don pass
TRANSFER_LIMIT_EXCEEDED.message: Dis transfer pass your daily or per-transaction limit.

TRANSFER_INVALID_AMOUNT.title: Amount no correct
TRANSFER_INVALID_AMOUNT.message: Abeg enter valid transfer amount wey pass zero.

TRANSFER_SAME_ACCOUNT.title: Na same account
TRANSFER_SAME_ACCOUNT.message: The from and to accounts must be different.

TRANSFER_CUTOFF_PASSED.title: Cutoff time don pass
TRANSFER_CUTOFF_PASSED.message: Today processing cutoff don pass. Your transfer go process next business day.

TRANSFER_NOT_FOUND.title: Transfer no dey
TRANSFER_NOT_FOUND.message: We no fit find the transfer wey you dey find.

BILL_NOT_FOUND.title: Bill no dey
BILL_NOT_FOUND.message: We no fit find the bill or payee wey you dey find.

BILL_PAST_DUE.title: Bill don pass due date
BILL_PAST_DUE.message: Dis bill don pass im due date. Late fees fit apply.

CARD_NOT_FOUND.title: Card no dey
CARD_NOT_FOUND.message: We no fit find the card wey you dey find.

CARD_LIMIT_INVALID.title: Card limit no correct
CARD_LIMIT_INVALID.message: The spending limit wey you enter no correct. Check the minimum and maximum.

RDC_IMAGE_QUALITY.title: Image quality wahala
RDC_IMAGE_QUALITY.message: We no fit read the check image well. Abeg take the photo again with better light.

RDC_AMOUNT_EXCEEDED.title: Deposit limit don pass
RDC_AMOUNT_EXCEEDED.message: Dis check pass your mobile deposit limit.

RDC_DUPLICATE_CHECK.title: Duplicate check found
RDC_DUPLICATE_CHECK.message: E be like say dem don deposit dis check before.

VALIDATION_ERROR.title: Validation error
VALIDATION_ERROR.message: Some fields get bad data. Abeg review and fix dem.

INVALID_INPUT.title: Bad input
INVALID_INPUT.message: Abeg check wetin you enter and try again.

RATE_LIMITED.title: Too many requests
RATE_LIMITED.message: You don make too many requests. Abeg wait small and try again.

INTERNAL_ERROR.title: Something go wrong
INTERNAL_ERROR.message: Unexpected error happen. We don tell our team.

SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE.title: Service no dey available
SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE.message: Dis service no dey available for now. Abeg try again in few minutes.

GATEWAY_ERROR.title: Connection error
GATEWAY_ERROR.message: We no fit connect to the banking service. Check your connection and try again.

fallback.title: Something go wrong
fallback.message: Unexpected error happen. Abeg try again.
